titleStmt.title: SII 41.468: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 468. (A.R. No. 682 of 1905.) Tiruvēḍagam, Nilakkōṭṭai Taluk, Madura District. On the east wall of the first prakara, right of entrance, of the Patrikāparamēśvara temple at Tiruvēḍagam.

summary.p: Partly damaged. King's gift of the payment towards the tax mākkalam-pāḍikāval on certain land in Tiruvēḍagam in possession of the sabhā of the village, for food offerings, etc in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻapurattu virābhiṣekamum vijaiyābhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷina śrīsuntarapāṇṭiya
devarkku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu tirumukappaṭikalveṭṭu pākaṉūrkūṟṟattut tevatāṉam tiruveṭakattu Uṭaiyār tiruveṭakaṭattu śrīkāriyañ ceyvāṉu
kkum tevakaṉmikkum Innāyaṉāṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku Ivvūr sabhaiyār paṟṟu Ittēvar tevatāṉam pāṭakappaṭi ni
lam Onṟaraiye yiraṇṭu māvukku perumpūvukkum kuṟuvaikkum namakku Iṟuttu varukiṟa mākkalam pāṭikkāvalāl vanta nellu Ivvāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu mutal kuṭuttom Iv
vāṇṭu mutal kaikkoṇṭu tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷ cellap paṇṇi Ippaṭi cantirādittavaṟ celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvit
tuk koḷka Ippaṭikku Ivaimiḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuvil kūṟṟatut tuñcalūruṭaiyāṉ Araican civatāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu
ṇṇiṉeṉ Ikkoyil cilvācāryyaṉ civallavaṉāna pākaṉūṟkkūṟṟattu Ācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu . §
Digital edition of SII 41.468 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
